creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 147159
The port in shar format (20140910)

- Replaced MODELVIEWER with MODELCOMPILER option. It's not related to modelcompiler, rather "pioneer -modelviewer" command, where pioneer is installed. The modelcompiler is different tool.
- Replaced USE_GITHUB with direct github.com address for MASTER_SITES. There are release tags with archives.
- Added the URL to Quickstart.txt file for pkg-message, in case, where DOCS option is not used, or DOCSDIR otherwise.
- Added compiler:c++11-lang to USES, because the port needs C++11 compiler support to build.
- Updated to 20140910 release version:
https://github.com/pioneerspacesim/pioneer/releases/tag/20140910
